content.text: I'll start by collecting failure information from the current ETL job state.

input.command: echo "=== JOB STATUS ===" && kubectl get job etl-job -n spark-etl && echo && echo "=== PODS ===" && kubectl get pods -n spark-etl && echo && echo "=== ETL JOB LOGS ===" && kubectl logs -n spark-etl -l app=etl-job --tail=150

content.text: Confirmed: memory error found — `[INVALID_DRIVER_MEMORY] System memory 259522560 must be at least 471859200`. Now let's check the data skew diagnostics.

input.command: echo "=== SKEW INFO ===" && kubectl exec -n spark-etl -l app=data-generator -- cat /data/skew_info.txt && echo && echo "=== DIAGNOSTIC SERVER LOGS ===" && kubectl logs -n spark-etl -l app=diagnostic-server --tail=50
input.description: Check data skew info and diagnostic server logs

content.content:
Exit code 1
=== SKEW INFO ===
error: unknown shorthand flag: 'l' in -l
See 'kubectl exec --help' for usage.

tool_use_result:
Error: Exit code 1
=== SKEW INFO ===
error: unknown shorthand flag: 'l' in -l
See 'kubectl exec --help' for usage.

input.command:
POD=$(kubectl get pods -n spark-etl -l app=data-generator -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')
echo "pod=$POD"
kubectl exec -n spark-etl "$POD" -- cat /data/skew_info.txt
echo
echo "=== DIAGNOSTIC SERVER LOGS ==="
kubectl logs -n spark-etl -l app=diagnostic-server --tail=50
input.description: Check data skew info via exec on named pod and diagnostic server logs

description: Check data skew info via exec on named pod and diagnostic server logs

summary: Check data skew info via exec on named pod and diagnostic server logs

content.content:
pod=data-generator-7457c55c8b-978bj
DATA SKEW REPORT
================
total_records=100000
distinct_user_ids=1000
hot_user_id=999
hot_user_records=50000
skew_ratio=500x
note: user_id 999 holds ~50% of all records (Stage 3 aggregation OOMs)

=== DIAGNOSTIC SERVER LOGS ===
DIAGNOSTIC: analyzing data distribution
DIAGNOSTIC: hot key user_id=999 holds ~50% of records
DIAGNOSTIC: skew_ratio=500x (>> 10x threshold)
DIAGNOSTIC: Stage 3 GROUP BY user_id triggers OutOfMemoryError
DIAGNOSTIC: remediation -> raise executor memory, scale workers, or enable AQE skewJoin

content.text: Diagnosis confirmed: user_id 999 holds 50% of records, skew_ratio=500x. Now let's find and fix the job manifest — first locate it.

input.description: Search for local etl-job.yaml manifest referenced in task

input.command: kubectl get job etl-job -n spark-etl -o yaml
input.description: Dump current etl-job YAML to use as template for the fix

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"etl-job","namespace":"spark-etl"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"etl-job"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","set -e\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\necho \"Stage 1: load raw data\"\necho \"Stage 2: clean and transform\"\necho \"Stage 3: aggregate by user_id (skewed on user_id 999)\"\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 256m \\\n  --conf spark.executor.memory=256m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  500\necho \"spark_etl_pipeline_verified\"\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-etl","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"2Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T01:53:57Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: etl-job
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 4a169c49-17a2-471d-886f-f97c2ed4f121
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: etl-job
    controller-uid: 4a169c49-17a2-471d-886f-f97c2ed4f121
    job-name: etl-job
  name: etl-job
  namespace: spark-etl
  resourceVersion: "2830225"
  uid: 4a169c49-17a2-471d-886f-f97c2ed4f121
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 4a169c49-17a2-471d-886f-f97c2ed4f121
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: etl-job
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 4a169c49-17a2-471d-886f-f97c2ed4f121
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: etl-job
        controller-uid: 4a169c49-17a2-471d-886f-f97c2ed4f121
        job-name: etl-job
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "Stage 1: load raw data"
          echo "Stage 2: clean and transform"
          echo "Stage 3: aggregate by user_id (skewed on user_id 999)"
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 256m \
            --conf spark.executor.memory=256m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            500
          echo "spark_etl_pipeline_verified"
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-etl
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  conditions:
  - lastProbeTime: "2026-07-10T01:54:43Z"
    lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T01:54:43Z"
    message: Job has reached the specified backoff limit

      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "Stage 1: load raw data"
          echo "Stage 2: clean and transform"
          echo "Stage 3: aggregate by user_id (skewed on user_id 999)"
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 256m \
            --conf spark.executor.memory=256m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            500
          echo "spark_etl_pipeline_verified"
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-etl
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
